From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [2012 World Outdoor Bowls Championship – Men's Pairs](/w/index.php?title=2012_World_Outdoor_Bowls_Championship_%E2%80%93_Men%27s_Pairs&redirect=no "2012 World Outdoor Bowls Championship – Men's Pairs"))

Lawn bowls event

| * [v](/wiki/Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship "Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship") * [t](/w/index.php?title=Template_talk:Bowls2012WorldChampionship&action=edit&redlink=1 "Template talk:Bowls2012WorldChampionship (page does not exist)") * [e](/wiki/Special:EditPage/Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship "Special:EditPage/Template:Bowls2012WorldChampionship") | | |

The **2012 World Outdoor Bowls Championship men's pairs**[[1]](#cite_note-1) was held at the Lockleys Bowling Club in [Adelaide](/wiki/Adelaide "Adelaide"), [Australia](/wiki/Australia "Australia"). Some of the qualifying Rounds were held at the nearby Holdfast Bowling Club in [Glenelg North](/wiki/Glenelg_North,_South_Australia "Glenelg North, South Australia").[[2]](#cite_note-2)

[Alex Marshall](/wiki/Alex_Marshall_(bowls) "Alex Marshall (bowls)") and [Paul Foster](/wiki/Paul_Foster_(bowls) "Paul Foster (bowls)") won the men's pairs Gold.[[3]](#cite_note-3)
